name: climate_policy_model_based_triage_marrowbridge_jus_mer
premise: Two departments published incompatible guidance; frontline staff are improvising and liability is concentrating on one signature line. In Climate Policy, the situation tagged internally around climate policy model based triage marrowbridge jus mer has converged with local pressure in the Marrowbridge corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. A downstream jurisdiction will copy whatever is decided here verbatim into its own emergency order within hours. A vendor’s root-cause paragraph contradicts your internal postmortem draft; both cannot be true, but neither is fully disprovable yet. A hard operational cutoff hits in under twenty minutes unless a named executive posts a decision in the command log. The organization’s past incidents make justice feel morally loud today, while mercy is the value that quietly erodes if you always choose expediency.

agents.name: Talia Hughes
agents.identity: I am Talia Hughes, the incident lead whose name will appear on the after-action report in Climate Policy. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat mercy as disposable collateral every time justice spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Arjun Kim
agents.identity: I am Arjun Kim, the risk and equity liaison pushing back on silent harms in Climate Policy. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so justice cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes mercy in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will freeze the riskiest workflow steps and staff a manual bridge until equity and error-rate checks clear—trading speed for defensibility on mercy.
I will let the fastest operational path proceed under heightened monitoring and rollback triggers—trading some certainty on mercy for immediate traction on justice.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Silence will be interpreted as a decision by everyone outside this room. Talia Hughes must choose under justice versus mercy. What does Talia Hughes do?
